headline: James Gifas Joins First Horizon Bank as Senior Vice President, Deputy Head of Treasury Management
summary: First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN or "First Horizon") announced today James Gifas has joined the organization as Senior Vice President, Deputy Head of Treasury Management.
